responses.text: Among the 2,199 people who committed suicide in October 2020, 879 were women, an increase of 88.6% over the same period in 2019.
The pandemic disproportionately affects the psychological health of children, adolescents and women
The number of suicides in Japan reached 21,077 in 2020, the first increase in 11 years, and even 2.5 times the number of deaths from COVID-19.
Prime Minister of Japan Yoshihide Suga decided to introduce the post of Minister to combat loneliness and isolation.
The family environment in Japan has changed due to the coronavirus epidemic.
Men committed suicide more often, with 1,320, an increase of 23% in October 2020.
Especially housewives are affected by the pandemic
The number of people who died by suicide in October in Japan exceeded the number of deaths due to COVID-19 in Japan, with the most significant impact on women and students.

The social and economic consequences of the pandemic have also led to mental health problems for many Japanese.

Palestinian Authority President Mahmud Abbas said the agreement was a "provocation" to the Palestinians and a total "treason" for the Palestinians to see Jerusalem as their future capital.

Query:The formal signing of the agreement on normalization of relations between the Zionist regime, the United Arab Emirates and Bahrain in Washington provoked a negative and severe reaction from the Palestinian groups.

Palestinian Authority Prime Minister Mohammed Ashtiyah pointed to the agreement between the United Arab Emirates and Israel to normalize relations and halt the plan for the annexation of the Palestinian territories.

Mansour Abbas, another Arab MP for the Knesset, stressed that real peace will be achieved with the end of the Israeli occupation and the establishment of an independent Palestinian state in the West Bank and Gaza with Jerusalem as its capital.

NASA plans to use the MOXIE system for a manned mission to Mars in the next 10 to 15 years.
The Mars oxygen field resource utilization experimental instrument, MOXIE, makes 5 grams of oxygen from carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere.
MOXIE can obtain up to 10 grams of oxygen per hour
5 grams of oxygen would be enough for one astronaut to breathe for about 10 minutes
NASA plans that the mission of the device on the red planet will last 687 days
The MOXIE system can convert 96% of the carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere into oxygen.
